recentPapers.title: Generative Modeling with Energy-Based Models
recentPapers.abstract: Advances in energy-based models for generative modeling and their applications to vision and language tasks.

recentPapers.title: Compositional Object Representations
recentPapers.abstract: Learning compositional representations of objects for improved scene understanding and generation.

recentPapers.title: Active Learning with Deep Generative Models
recentPapers.abstract: Using deep generative models to guide active learning and reduce labeling requirements.

recentPapers.title: Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models
recentPapers.abstract: Empirical and theoretical analysis of scaling laws for neural language models and their implications.

recentPapers.title: Training Language Models to Follow Instructions
recentPapers.abstract: Methods for fine-tuning large language models to follow human instructions with improved alignment.

recentPapers.title: Emergent Abilities of Large Language Models
recentPapers.abstract: Analysis of emergent capabilities that arise in large language models as they scale.

recentPapers.title: Distributed Optimization for Machine Learning
recentPapers.abstract: Distributed algorithms for large-scale machine learning optimization with communication efficiency.

recentPapers.title: First-Order Methods for Convex Optimization
recentPapers.abstract: Analysis and improvements of first-order optimization methods for convex and non-convex problems.

recentPapers.title: Interior Point Methods and Applications
recentPapers.abstract: Advanced interior point methods for solving large-scale optimization problems in machine learning.

recentPapers.title: Causal Inference in Machine Learning
recentPapers.abstract: Methods for incorporating causal reasoning into machine learning for improved model interpretability.

recentPapers.title: Do-Calculus and Causal Discovery
recentPapers.abstract: Algorithms for causal discovery from observational data using do-calculus framework.

recentPapers.title: The Book of Why: Causal Reasoning in Science
recentPapers.abstract: Foundational principles of causal reasoning and their applications to scientific discovery.
